case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC. VS. KATHARINE A MALONE ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1788.60(A) (TRANSACTION ID # 62662210) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC.
DECLARATION REGARDING STATEMENT OF VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 100032397) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-16-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MALONE, KATHARINE A AN INDIVIDUAL $22,207.02 PRINCIPAL, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $22,642.02, SEE SCANNED DOC

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-16-2018 CONTINUED TO MAR-19-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $435.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 62662210) AS TO DEFENDANT MALONE, KATHARINE A AN INDIVIDUAL
PLAINTIFF'S WAIVER OF INTEREST IN EXCESS OF 10% (TRANSACTION ID # 62662210) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC.

DECLARATION REGARDING CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 62662210) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-19-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
